channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Motorola : un choix surprenant pour le futur Razr 70 Ultra
item.description: Après la réussite que fut le Razr 60 Ultra, Motorola n'allait pas laisser passer l'occasion d'enfoncer le clou. Le constructeur devrait dévoiler sous peu le successeur de son smartphone à clapet pliant. Avec une particularité qui ne fera pas plaisir à tout le monde.

item.title: Anycubic Photon P1 3D printer review: A huge step up for the company, and while aspects are simplistic, I can't argue with the print quality
item.description: Incredible quality from this compact desktop resin 3D printer.

item.title: I’ve used a Mac in every decade since the 1980s — Apple’s 50-year journey still feels magical
item.description: A Mac user since the 1980s — and former Apple magazine editor — looks back on 50 years of Apple to explore how it went from rebellious outsider to tech giant while still managing to feel a little magical.

item.title: Rivian gets another $1B from Volkswagen
item.description: The two companies have been collaborating on a joint venture that would see Rivian tech go in VW's EVs.

item.title: The AI Doc explores how we can survive an uncertain AI future
item.description: Anxiety, more so than technological rigor, sits at the heart of The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist. Director Daniel Roher is anxious about the future he's bringing a child into — will it be an AI-driven utopia? Or does it spell certain doom, something explored in countless sci-fi stories. To figure it all out, he interviewed some of the most well known AI proponents and critics, including The Empire of AI author Karen Hao, AI researcher Emily Bender and Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei. The AI Doc, which hits theaters this weekend, doesn't really shed new light. For that, I'd recommend r...

item.title: April Set to Unleash Some Wild Weather Across Parts of the US, Meteorologists Warn
item.description: Brutal thunderstorms and tornado outbreaks have battered much of the nation throughout March, and it looks like this severe weather pattern is here to stay.

item.title: Amazon rachète Fauna Robotics pour lancer son premier robot humanoïde domestique
item.description: Vous vous souvenez d'Astro, ce petit écran sur roues d'Amazon ? Oubliez-le. Avec l'acquisition de Fauna Robotics, Amazon passe aux choses sérieuses : un véritable robot humanoïde capable de ramasser des jouets.

item.title: Ce HDD de 5 To est à -30 % alors que la crise continue de faire des ravages
item.description: L'Easy Store 5 To de Western Digital est une très bonne solution pour avoir un important espace de stockage dans sa poche. En ce moment, il est disponible chez Cdiscount pour 114,99 euros au lieu de 159,99 euros.

item.title: Iranian hackers claim breach of FBI director Kash Patel’s personal email account
item.description: Handala, a pro-Iranian hacking group allegedly working for Iran’s government, published emails it said were taken from the Gmail account of FBI director Kash Patel.

item.title: Scientists Create ‘Living Pharmacy’ Implant That Doses 3 Drugs at Once
item.description: In their latest research, scientists showed the HOBIT implant could remain effective inside rats for at least a month.

item.title: J’ai essayé le Porsche Cayenne Turbo électrique : la Porsche la plus puissante de l’histoire est un SUV de 2,7 tonnes qui ne m’a pas laissé indifférent
item.description: Le Porsche Cayenne entre dans une nouvelle dimension. Plus qu’une simple déclinaison électrique, cette génération marque un basculement stratégique pour le constructeur : faire de l’électrique la nouvelle référence en matière de performance. Et avec une version Turbo capable de dépasser les 1 100 ch, le SUV familial devient tout simplement la Porsche de série la plus puissante jamais produite. ...

item.title: This modular crafting machine can create custom shirts, phone cases, and molds
item.description: xTool, a company best known amongst makers for its laser-based cutting and engraving tools, has announced a new multi-function crafting machine called the WonderPress. It's not an all-in-one device that can help you get an Etsy store off the ground, but the WonderPress can help turn designs from other machines, like Cricuts or sublimation printers, […]...

item.title: The four shifts reshaping Microsoft 365 security and resilience
item.description: As AI adoption amplifies governance blind spots in Microsoft 365, organizational resilience is more than individual tools.

item.title: I've spent hours shopping Amazon's Big Spring sale — here are 25 deals that I wouldn't want to miss
item.description: As TechRadar's deals editor, I've spent hours shopping Amazon's Big Spring Sale so you don't have to – here are 25 deals that are actually worth buying.

item.title: Une IA capable de comprendre le monde qui l’entoure grâce à un seul GPU : LeWordModel veut révolutionner le secteur
item.description: Yann LeCun, Français considéré comme l'un des pères de l'IA moderne, dévoile LeWorldModel avec son équipe. Les premiers tests sont très encourageants.

item.title: ICE Agents Frustrate Airport Workers as Shutdown Drags On
item.description: “ICE are here and they’re doing literally nothing to help,” said an airline worker in New York.

item.title: The difference between tools and outcomes: what real integration looks like
item.description: Discover how real integration goes beyond connectivity to deliver measurable customer outcomes.

item.title: 'This is a final warning': Hackers say they'll leak "several terabytes" of ZenBusiness data
item.description: ShinyHunters are urging ZenBusiness to pay the ransom demand, otherwise they will leak "terabytes" of data.

item.title: PlayStation : la génération d’images d’AMD arrive sur les consoles de Sony, mais il va falloir être patient
item.description: Mark Cerny, architecte système en chef de la PlayStation 5, confirme que la technologie FSR Frame Generation d'AMD est prévue sur console PlayStation.

item.title: I Wouldn’t Plan on Wearing Smart Glasses to Court Anytime Soon
item.description: Courts across the country are saying "nu-uh" to smart glasses.

item.title: Strengthening cybersecurity in education through private sector partnership
item.description: As schools are increasingly targeted by cybercriminals, private sector investment equips them with tools to mitigate attacks.

item.title: As 4chan mocks UK regulators, will Ofcom turn to its 'last resort'?
item.description: With fines being ignored, Ofcom may turn to website blocks

item.title: Pourquoi la Nasa enterre-t-elle si brutalement le grand projet de station lunaire ?
item.description: La Lunar Gateway était un projet emblématique dans le cadre du programme Artemis de la Nasa. Et pourtant, il a été brusquement annulé suite aux annonces de l'agence spatiale américaine. Qu'est-ce qui a motivé cette décision au profit d'une base lunaire ?

item.title: Don't get the Apple Watch Ultra 3 — Amazon has a record-low deal on the Apple Watch Ultra 2, and it's just as powerful and accurate
item.description: Amazon has knocked $300 off one of Apple's best smartwatches, but this better-than-Black Friday deal won't be live for long.

item.title: Fin de la 2G : Orange débranche les premiers relais, SFR et Bouygues dévoilent leur calendrier
item.description: C’est le début d’une transition historique pour les télécoms français. Dès la semaine prochaine, le réseau 2G commencera à s'éteindre dans plusieurs régions, marquant la fin d'une époque pour laisser place aux technologies modernes.

item.title: The PlayStation Portal, PS5, and PS5 Pro are getting huge price hikes next month, Sony confirms
item.description: Sony has announced that it will be raising the price of its PlayStation 5 hardware again next month.

item.title: Mais c’est quoi ce nouveau volant ? On a testé l’étonnant Hypersquare des futures Peugeot 208
item.description: Oubliez vos habitudes. Avec son nouveau volant rectangulaire Hypersquare, Peugeot supprime la liaison mécanique entre vos mains et la route. Sensation de manette de jeu vidéo, visibilité accrue, agilité bluffante, nous avons pris les commandes de cette technologie qui facilitera vos créneaux. Essayer c'est l'adopter ?

item.title: Disney Will Not Bow to Audience Belief That the Rock’s ‘Moana’ Wig Looks Awful
item.description: Dwayne Johnson's Maui hairstyle was met with mockery after its debut in the Disney live-action film's latest trailer.

item.title: Apple Still Plans to Sell iPhones When It Turns 100
item.description: As the tech giant turns 50, WIRED spoke to executives about how they plan to win in the AI era.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, and more this weekend (March 27)
item.description: From Daredevil: Born Again's return to a new Netflix horror produced by Stranger Things' creators, there's lots to enjoy this weekend.

item.title: L’iPhone Fold ne sortirait pas en même temps que les iPhone 18 Pro
item.description: Le très informé Mark Gurman est formel : Apple n'est pas en mesure de proposer son premier iPhone pliable au même moment que les iPhone 18 Pro et 18 Pro Max.

item.title: We handpicked the 24 best Big Spring Sale deals under $50
item.description: Despite the fact that spring isn’t often associated with big discounts, Amazon seems keen to turn every season into one filled with savings. Case in point? The retailer is currently hosting a spring sales event, which will run through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. Retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Newegg have also hopped aboard […]

item.title: Sur YouTube, l’IA de Google remplace les titres et embrouille tout
item.description: Pour Google, l'IA est soluble dans n'importe quoi. Y compris là où ça n'a vraiment aucun intérêt comme sur la page d'accueil de YouTube ! Chez plusieurs utilisateurs, les titres des vidéos sont remplacées par des résumés IA du contenu. Une expérimentation contre-productive, en plus des hallucinations et raccourcis hâtifs habituels de l'IA générative....

item.title: Déjà plus de 100 € de réduction pour le tout nouveau MacBook Air 13 à la sauce M5 (et Wi-Fi 7)
item.description: Le MacBook Air 13 renfermant une puce M5 vient juste de sortir, mais on le trouve déjà moins cher sur Cdiscount. Sur la plateforme, cet ultraportable léger et polyvalent est affiché à 1 094 euros au lieu de 1 199 euros averc un code promo.

item.title: Secure your data with a massive 75% off the price of Carbonite cloud backup
item.description: This time-limited offer covers any of the three Carbonite Backup plans, including Basic, Plus, and Prime Plan.

item.title: My most played game of 2026 is now so cheap it equates to just 7p per hour of entertainment — but the offer only lasts for a limited time
item.description: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 is massively discounted right now over at Amazon.

item.title: Motorola’s Razr Ultra 2026 might be a hair thicker than last year’s version
item.description: While most flagship phones have been steadily getting slimmer over recent years, the upcoming 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra could end up being a bit chunkier than its predecessor. Leaked measurements of the phone shared by XpertPick and OnLeaks on Thursday show that it will be slightly thicker than the 2025 version, about […]

item.title: Returning from a humanitarian aid trip to Cuba, Americans have phones seized at US airport
item.description: Members of a convoy that delivered humanitarian aid to Cuba were detained and interrogated by Customs and Border Protection (CBP) upon returning to the United States on a charter flight from Havana. Of the 20 US citizens who were pulled for secondary inspection at Miami International Airport on Wednesday morning, 18 had their phones and […]

item.title: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware
item.description: The tech giant's claim that it has not seen any successful spyware attacks targeting Apple devices with Lockdown Mode enabled comes amid a leak of hacking tools targeting users running devices with older software.

item.title: Comment Razer revient en arrière pour aller de l’avant avec son nouveau Blade 16
item.description: Razer annonce cette semaine le millésime 2026 de son iconique Blade 16. À défaut d'un changement de design, l'appareil troque son ancien processeur AMD Strix Point pour une puce Intel Panther Lake flambant neuve... assortie de la mémoire vive la plus énervée du marché.

item.title: Doctors Struggle to Spot AI-Generated X-Rays, Raising Scam Risks
item.description: In tests, radiologists struggled to discern genuine X-rays from AI-generated fakes.

item.title: English learning app used by Sony and Paramount put millions of users at risk
item.description: Five million Japanese have had their recordings leak to the internet through a misconfigured Google Cloud database.

item.title: Fuite géante chez Anthropic : pourquoi le futur Claude inquiète déjà ses créateurs
item.description: Anthropic a mis au point une nouvelle version surpuissante de Claude. Cette nouvelle itération, considérée le modèle « de loin le plus puissant » jamais entraîné par la start-up, suscite même les inquiétudes d'Anthropic. Selon l'entreprise, Mythos pose des « risques de cybersécurité significatifs ».

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until […]

item.title: Summer heat will turn any gaming room into a sauna — and that's why I'm investing in a new portable AC early
item.description: Hot summer days while indoors can be a rough experience, especially for gamers, and that's why investing in a new portable AC now makes sense.

item.title: TCL et Bang & Olufsen lancent la barre de son A65K et renouvellent la gamme audio de la marque
item.description: TCL est connu pour ses téléviseurs mais la marque propose aussi des barres de son, notamment le modèle A65K marquant le début de la collaboration entre le géant chinois et Bang & Olufsen. À cela, ajoutez un rafraîchissement complet de la gamme de barres de son S et de l’ajout d’un caisson de basses au système home cinéma Z100 Dolby Atmos FlexConnect. ...

item.title: What Do You Mean Glen Powell Is Fox McCloud in the ‘Super Mario Galaxy’ Movie
item.description: Which means you have to watch Glen Powell do 'Star Fox' cosplay, naturally.

item.title: The photo mode consultant helping you take better video game screenshots
item.description: Three children stare at the dilapidated remains of a battlefield, with trees and man-made structures mostly razed to the ground, save for the sturdy frame of a lone trebuchet. It's a pensive snapshot of the bloodshed in A Plague Tale: Innocence by virtual photographer Ludovic "Shinobi" Helme - but it's no mere screenshot. It's a […]

item.title: These ‘clinically tested’ gummies may or may not help you poop
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Influencer after influencer says the same thing about Grüns. The gummy vitamins are delightful, chockful of whole organic […]...

item.title: TCL dévoile sa nouvelle gamme de TV SQD-Mini LED et son premier téléviseur RGB Mini LED
item.description: C’est l’heure de l’officialisation et de la découverte de toutes les caractéristiques techniques mais également des prix pour les nouvelles séries de TV TCL avec les technologies SQD-Mini LED et RGB Mini LED au programme.
